problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
